paragraphs.context: v12 straight pipe drag race _ transcript welcome to the loudest ever drag race on carwow so we ' ve got a porsche1 gt3 got a ferrari 8812 super fast we ' ve got lamborghini roal and a lamborghini aventador sv and they ' ve all been fitted with gintani exhaust and we ' ve had to come to this special location which has no noise restrictions cuz these things are just so loud as you ' re about to find out as we race them over the standing quar mile i ' m now watson and you ' re watching carw the lamborghini aventador sv has a 6.5 l naturally aspirated v12 750 horsepower 690 nm of torque all - wheel drive and a 7 - speed robotized manual gearbox with launch control it weighs around 1, 600 kg and costs from 238, 000 l back in 2015 the lamborghini rto has a 6.5 l natur aspirated v12 plus a hybrid system with three electric motors combined you get 1, 5 horsepower 1, 162 newt m of torque all - wheel drive and an 8 - speed dual clutch automatic gear box with launch control it weighs in at under, 1900 kg and cost from around £ 447, 000 the ferrari 812 superfast has a 6.5 l natur aspirated v12 800 horsepower 718 nm of torque rear wheel drive and a 7 - speed dual clutch automatic gearbox with launch control it weighs around 1, 600 kg and costs from £ 253, 000 in 2017 the porche 91 gt3 has a 4 l naturo aspirated flat 6 510 horsepower 470 newm of tourque is rear wheel drive and has a 7 - speed pdk dual clutch automatic gearbox with launch control it weighs 1, 400 kg and costs from 146, 000 now before we get into the racing we are going to find out which of these cars is loudest when you rev them at a standstill so i ' m going to rev up my aventador we ' ve got rory holding a sand meter just behind me i ' m going to give it some revs valves are open on my gintani exhaust oh by the way thanks to gv performance and olle for sorting this race out for us but here we go pretty loud let ' s find out how many decibel that was rory peak debel 25. 7 let ' s find out how loud that is i ' m going to ask chat gpt
